title: Well-formed k6 load test — warmup, SLO thresholds, ramp-up, parameterized data
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements: (1) warmup phase excluded from thresholds via tags, (2) SLO thresholds for p99, p50, error rate, (3) gradual ramp-up with 3-min steady state, (4) parameterized user data via SharedArray, (5) think time between requests, (6) custom error rate metric.
